label: set membership
gloss: member(x, S) holds iff x (of sort s) belongs to S (of sort Set(s)).
notes: Primitive of the profile-M v0 basis (design-math-sector.md SS2.2, SS3.2); pinned to the bundle's basis table, analogous to a profile-1 prime record.

nsmBridge.note: PART (relational-substantive prime) is mereology, not membership; conflating parthood with element-hood is a classic category error (transitivity differs), so no bridge is recorded.
